svg.title: Real-time fraud detection pipeline — Bank of America
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing transaction flow through Kafka, Spark Streaming, feature engineering, XGBoost ML scoring, FastAPI microservices, and monitoring dashboard
svg.text: Real-Time Fraud Detection & Risk Scoring Platform
Bank of America · Event-driven microservices · 1–2M daily transactions
Processes Kafka stream · enriches with customer metadata from reference systems
28+ features · behavioural profiling · statistical validation against fraud labels
First layer of defence · low latency · known patterns
SonarQube · Nexus · Auto-scaling · 30% faster deploy cycles
Measured via timestamp tracking · Kafka offset monitoring
Koushik Gudipelly · Bank of America · Real-Time Fraud Detection Platform · Aug 2024 – Present
